Independent Project Assurance

The assurance layer between
what your project promises
and what it delivers.

We provide independent project assurance to protect time, cost, and contractual outcomes on high-stakes infrastructure and real asset projects. Engaged when the programme cannot afford to be wrong.

What We Do

Five areas of practice.
One standard of independence.

We function as an independent assurance layer across the full project lifecycle. Design maturity and regulatory constraints are delivery risks, and we account for them within every mandate we hold.

01 / 05

Project Assurance

Independent oversight across schedule, cost, risk, design maturity, and regulatory constraints. We provide the view that internal teams cannot produce: an objective, evidenced assessment of whether the project will deliver on its commitments. Design development gaps and unresolved approval dependencies are identified before they crystallise into disputes.

Independent · Objective · Evidenced
02 / 05

Delay & Claims Strategy

Forensic delay analysis and EOT entitlement from first notice through adjudication. We establish causation with precision, distinguishing contractor performance, employer-risk events, delays driven by design changes or late information, and constraints imposed by environmental approvals or regulatory decisions. The resulting position withstands cross-examination under NEC, FIDIC, and bespoke forms.

SCL Protocol · FIDIC · NEC
03 / 05

Contract Advisory

Commercial counsel from pre-award through final account. We administer notices, compensation events, and correspondence with the discipline that preserves entitlement. Design obligations, environmental conditions precedent, and regulatory approval milestones are contractual commitments, and we ensure they are administered with the same rigour as any other programme obligation.

Pre-Award · Delivery · Close-Out
04 / 05

Bid & Tender Strategy

Commercially defensible positions for high-value infrastructure tenders. Programme commitments, risk allocations, design obligations, environmental assessment requirements, and regulatory approval paths made at tender become contractual obligations. We ensure the position submitted is achievable, not merely acceptable to the client.

Pre-Contract · Commercial · Defensible
05 / 05

Real Estate Strategic Advisory

Development appraisals, planning strategy, asset management frameworks, and investment advisory for real asset projects. We assess development feasibility accounting for planning consent timelines, design programme obligations, and regulatory approval paths, then provide PM assurance across landmark residential, commercial, and mixed-use schemes. Our work integrates financial modelling with technical and programme reality to produce investment positions the market can trust.

Development · Planning · Investment
Where We Add Value

The situations that require an independent position.

We are engaged when internal reporting has lost credibility, when a programme is under pressure, or when the commercial consequences of getting it wrong are too significant to leave to the project team alone.

→

Programmes under delay or scrutiny

When a project is running late and stakeholders need an independent diagnosis: establishing causes, quantifying exposure, and identifying what is recoverable.

→

Claims and dispute exposure

When a contractor has submitted a claim, or when your own entitlement needs to be established, structured, and substantiated for adjudication or arbitration.

→

Delays driven by design changes or incomplete information

When late or incomplete design is disrupting construction and the commercial consequences need to be quantified, attributed, and recovered through the correct contractual mechanism.

→

Regulatory and environmental approval dependencies

When clearances, consents, or statutory approvals are on or adjacent to the critical path, and who bears that risk and whether it has been correctly noticed is still unresolved.

→

Independent assurance for funders and stakeholders

When a development bank, equity sponsor, or board requires a view on programme health that is not produced by the team whose performance it is assessing.

→

Programme recovery and rebaseline

When a project needs to be reset: establishing where it actually is, what a credible recovery looks like, and which assumptions it depends on.

→

High-value bids and real estate appraisals

When the programme, risk position, and commercial terms submitted at tender, or the development appraisal submitted to a funder, will define obligations for years and need to be right before commitment.

Trusted by Clients Across Major Projects

We have supported leading contractors, developers, project owners, and development finance institutions across infrastructure and real asset projects.

World Bank

Selected Experience

A record built on complex mandates,
not comfortable ones.

Selected engagements across rail, aviation, water, energy, and real asset projects. All delivered by the senior principals available for your mandate. Further references available on request.

Delay & Claims Strategy UAE — Rail Infrastructure

Hafeet Rail — EOT Entitlement & Forensic Claims

Major rail programme subject to significant programme dispute. Design-change events and third-party interface delays formed the bulk of contested entitlement. Internal reporting had lost credibility with the client.

Forensic windows analysis produced. Design-change impacts separated from concurrent contractor causes. EOT entitlement structured and substantiated for adjudication. Active: L&T PowerChina JV.

Project Assurance UAE — Rail Systems

Etihad Rail Stage 2 & 3 — Independent Systems Assurance

Complex multi-contract rail programme requiring systems assurance against defined safety criteria. Design deliverable milestones were not linked to construction readiness, creating unacknowledged programme risk.

Systems assurance framework established. Design stage gate assessment integrated into programme oversight. Assurance deliverables issued across construction and commissioning phases.

Project Assurance · Environmental India — Flood Infrastructure

World Bank — Climate Hazard Programme Assurance, Tawi River

World Bank-funded programme with environmental assessment requirements and regulatory approval dependencies on the critical path. Approval lead times had not been accurately modelled in the baseline programme.

Environmental approval dependency mapping completed. Programme baseline revised to reflect realistic approval timelines. Risk-adjusted programme with P50/P80 scenarios produced for funder reporting.

Bid & Tender Strategy Oman — Energy Infrastructure

Barka WTE IPP — Bid Assurance & Commercial Strategy

High-value waste-to-energy bid with complex design obligations, technology transfer requirements, and environmental permit dependencies embedded in the RFP. Programme commitments at tender would define contractual obligations for 25 years.

Bid programme stress-tested against design and permit lead times. Risk allocation reviewed against FIDIC Silver Book. Commercially defensible position established.

Real Estate Strategic Advisory India — Industrial / Logistics

ITC Limited — Regulatory Strategy & Real Asset Advisory

Industrial asset requiring regulatory recategorisation from Orange to White category, with commercial and programme implications that needed to be correctly characterised and managed.

Regulatory process navigated successfully. Commercial implications documented and managed. Recategorisation achieved with programme impact minimised. Asset value outcome preserved.

Proprietary Tools

Five analysis engines
supporting our advisory.

Built over years of active mandates, these are the tools our principals use on every engagement. They are not marketed separately. They are the analytical infrastructure behind our advice, available within retained engagements or as licensed software.

Tools identify risks linked to design readiness, track dependencies related to approvals and regulatory processes, and surface programme exposure before it crystallises into disputes.

Request Advisory

Conducted by principals, not pre-sales teams

01 / 05
Assurance-Grade Diagnostics

Schedule Intelligence

Reads any Primavera P6 XER and delivers a board-ready health check covering DCMA 14-point, GAO 9-point, critical path forensics, float integrity, and EVM. Results delivered in under 60 seconds. Identifies where design dependencies and regulatory approval milestones are absent from the baseline.

02 / 05
AI Schedule Engine

Generative Schedule

Generates a fully-logicked, resource-loaded CPM schedule from project scope, BoQ, drawings, and method statements, exportable to Primavera P6 and MS Project. Re-runnable on scope change. Includes design deliverable milestones and approval path activities by default.

03 / 05
3-D Monte Carlo · QSRA

Risk Intelligence

Three-dimensional Monte Carlo simulation across Time, Cost, and Performance, producing P50/P80/P90 positions and SCL-aligned claim narratives. Identifies risks linked to design readiness, tracks regulatory approval dependencies, and produces defensible positions for dispute contexts.

04 / 05
Lean Production Control

Last Planner System

Five-level lean production workflow from master schedule through to weekly work plan, with constraint logging, PPC tracking, and trade reliability scoring. Surfaces design deliverable constraints and approval dependencies before they block production.

05 / 05
EVM · Field Dashboard

Progress Intelligence

Real-time earned value and progress dashboards connecting field data to PMO reporting. Web platform for programme directors; native mobile app for site supervisors. Tracks design milestone completion and regulatory approval status alongside construction progress.

Why Project Assure

What makes the difference
is who does the work.

Brought in when projects are under pressure

Our mandates begin when internal reporting has lost credibility, when claims exposure is mounting, or when a programme needs an independent diagnosis that the project team cannot produce.

Schedule, contracts, and claims combined

We integrate schedule forensics, commercial analysis, and contract administration in a single mandate. Every element supports the others, because disputes are never limited to one discipline.

Design, approvals, and programme risk understood

We understand how design maturity, regulatory approvals, and environmental dependencies interact with programme commitments. We account for them because they determine outcomes.

Directly with decision-makers

Every engagement is led by a senior principal. The person you brief is the person who does the work. No delegation to analysts, no dilution of focus across thirty concurrent mandates.

Independent, defensible positions

Our independence is structural, not claimed. We are not engaged by both sides. We do not manage the programme and assure it simultaneously. Our positions hold in adjudication.

Registered in India, deployed worldwide

Registered in Chennai. Active across UAE, Oman, Saudi Arabia, India, and internationally, without a global office overhead passed on in fees.
